Scratch — 5 boats, 5 races, one discard (threshold: 1 discard at 5 races)

RRS A8.1: A series may exclude (discard) a boat's worst race score. The threshold here is: 1 discard when 5 or more races have been sailed. Key test: without the discard Bob leads (8 pts) and Alice is second (11 pts). Once the discard applies, Alice drops her race-5 DNC penalty (6 pts) and nets 5, while Bob drops his worst 2nd place and nets 6. The ranking inverts — Alice wins.

Scoring configuration: 1 discard from race 5. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

Alice wins races 1–3 and finishes 2nd in race 4, then takes a DNC in race 5.
Bob finishes 2nd in races 1–3, then wins races 4 and 5.
    Alice does not race (DNC = N+1 = 6 pts). Bob wins.
Points per race (N+1 = 6):
  Alice: 1, 1, 1, 2, 6  — total=11. Drop race 5 (DNC=6) → net=5.
  Bob:   2, 2, 2, 1, 1  — total=8.  Drop race 1 (worst=2, earliest) → net=6.
  Carol: 3, 3, 3, 3, 2  — total=14. Drop race 1 (worst=3, earliest) → net=11.
  David: 4, 4, 4, 4, 3  — total=19. Drop race 1 (worst=4, earliest) → net=15.
  Eve:   5, 5, 5, 5, 4  — total=24. Drop race 1 (worst=5, earliest) → net=19.

Without discard: Bob(8) leads Alice(11). With discard: Alice(5) leads Bob(6).
Rank Sail Helm R1 R2 R3 R4 R5 Total Nett
1st 101 Alice 1 1 1 2 (6 DNC) 11 5
2nd 202 Bob (2) 2 2 1 1 8 6
3rd 303 Carol (3) 3 3 3 2 14 11
4th 404 David (4) 4 4 4 3 19 15
5th 505 Eve (5) 5 5 5 4 24 19
